elements.text:
You are invited to a Halloween party with your coworkers and you're only close to a couple of people there. You decide to wear a costume. When you arrive, everyone looks at you. 

Here are some thoughts that might pop into mind:

text: I think that I made a huge mistake by wearing this, but realize that it's OK to wear what I want.
This is the best costume I've ever worn.
I really stand out, but I like the way I look.
The other people are judging me for wearing this costume.
